# KL Servis Rumah Full AI Summary

KL Servis Rumah provides home maintenance and improvement services in Kuala Lumpur and Selangor. Core services are house painting, plumbing leak repair and fixture installation, plaster ceiling repair and gypsum partitions, waterproofing including PU injection grouting, and handyman work such as TV mounting, doors, locks, curtains, shelves and furniture assembly.

The business uses transparent market-rate pricing. Prices are confirmed before work begins. Typical published starts include handyman from RM80, plumbing from RM120, ceiling repair from RM180, waterproofing from RM250 and interior room painting from RM400.

Service areas include Kuala Lumpur, Cheras, Ampang, Setapak, Wangsa Maju, Kepong, Sri Petaling, Bukit Jalil, Mont Kiara, Bangsar, Petaling Jaya, Subang Jaya, Puchong, Shah Alam, Klang, Setia Alam, Kota Damansara, Ara Damansara, Sunway, USJ, Kajang, Semenyih, Putrajaya, Cyberjaya and many other Klang Valley suburbs.

Customers can book through WhatsApp at +60 11-1662 7349. The dispatch desk asks for location, property type, photos, and preferred date to prepare a suitable quotation.
